title: Easy Boat Pickup
description: Easily Pickup Boat with "shift + right click"
body:
# DESCRIPTION
Easier Pickup of Boats and Bamboo Rafts. - Holding **"Shift + Right Click"** will instantly pickup boats or rafts.
Tired of punching the boat? Tired of the boat moving away? Not anymore!

# Your support is very much appreciated 😊 [![Donate via Ko-fi](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/9fzfevkxtje7qus10kfb2/400-63-kofi_button_red-2.png?rlkey=neocwsdasxcn8syd6xvybldgp&st=6uwwgv4n&raw=1)](https://ko-fi.com/sorasetsuna) #
Can I use this in my modpack? - Yes, you may.
